claim().details: Allocation is computed lazily from stored hop-level reserves/demands

getAllocation(address).details: Computes allocation on the fly from stored hop-level data if not yet claimed

withdrawProceeds(address).details: Proceeds accrue as participants claim. Can be called multiple times.

withdrawUnallocatedArm(address).details: Uses hop-level totalAllocated (upper bound) minus claimed ARM to compute unallocated.      Safe: unallocated = initialFunding - totalAllocated_upper >= 0.

claim().notice: Claim ARM allocation and USDC refund after finalization

finalize().notice: Finalize the crowdfund: compute allocations or cancel

getCommitment(address).notice: Get commitment details for an address

getHopStats(uint8).notice: Get aggregate stats for a hop (visible during sale)

getInviteEdge(address).notice: Get invite edge (only after finalization — graph hidden during sale)

getInvitesRemaining(address).notice: Get remaining invites for an address

getParticipantCount().notice: Get total number of participants (whitelisted addresses)

invite(address).notice: Invite an address to participate at (your hop + 1)

isWhitelisted(address).notice: Check if an address is whitelisted

refund().notice: Full USDC refund if sale was canceled (below minimum)

withdrawProceeds(address).notice: Admin withdraws USDC sale proceeds to treasury

withdrawUnallocatedArm(address).notice: Admin withdraws unallocated ARM tokens to treasury
